metadata.description: Assigns an RBAC role (default: Reader) to the Blast service principal at the management group scope. The role inherits to all child subscriptions under this management group. The customer must provide the Object ID of the service principal as it appears in their tenant (Enterprise Applications).
The Object ID of the Blast service principal in your tenant. Find it in Azure Portal > Entra ID > Enterprise Applications > search for the app > Object ID.
The RBAC role definition ID to assign. Default is Reader (acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7).
